flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Schoolcraft Community College District rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.0k → $4.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Schoolcraft Community College District fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Schoolcraft Community College District are 14% above the public associate's-predominant peer median ($42.7k vs $37.3k).
